{{Quote|They redeployed troops to defend Pedd Four. So they think we gave them misinformation.|Goran Beviin, on the New Republic's response to intelligence provided by the Mandalorian Protectors|<ref name="APM" />}}
'''Pedd Four''' was an astronomical object<ref name="APM" /> located in the [[D'Astan sector/Legends|D'Astan sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> of the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It occupied the fourth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="APM" /> within the [[Pedd system/Legends|Pedd system]], and the [[Celanon Spur/Legends|Celanon Spur]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connected it to the [[Ord Cestus system/Legends|Ord Cestus]] and [[Celanon system/Legends|Celanon systems]].<ref name="TEA" />

When the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extragalactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invaded]] [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] under the [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|leadership]] of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], although publicly allied with the invaders, covertly provided intelligence to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. However, the latter [[Politics/Legends|government]] believed the information to be false and, disregarding it, redeployed [[Troop/Legends|troops]] from the<ref name="APM" /> [[Ciutric sector/Legends|Ciutric sector]]<ref name="EAOC Shirb">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Shirb system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[New Holgha]] in order to defend Pedd Four,<ref name="APM" /> which had become a New Republic stronghold by [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />

As a result, New Holgha [[Battle of New Holgha|fell]] to the Yuuzhan Vong, with Fett's lieutenant [[Goran Beviin]] notifying Fett about the reallocation of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic military resources]] to Pedd Four.<ref name="APM" /> By [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], the Yuuzhan Vong had [[Battle of Pedd 4|conquered]] the Pedd [[Star system/Legends|system]], as well.<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pedd Four was mentioned in the [[2006]] [[eBook]] ''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'' by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="APM" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Pedd system, and therefore Pedd Four, in grid square O-6.<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'' {{1stm}}
